use_cases: FAQ sections for e-commerce order tracking and return policies
Onboarding guides with step-by-step expandable content
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui accordion component implementing collapsible FAQ content with smooth expand/collapse animations. Built on Radix UI primitives for full keyboard accessibility, it displays a single-select expandable list of items with muted-foreground text styling. The minimalist design adapts fluidly across devices and integrates seamlessly with any shadcn/ui application requiring organized, space-efficient content disclosure.
